name: Tuna Fish, Mushrooms, and Celery
recipeIngredient: 6 1/2 oz (2) cans tuna chunk-style; packed in water
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tuna well. Discard the liquid and set the tuna aside for later use.
2. Melt margarine in a 1 1/2-quart saucepan over moderate heat.
3. Add celery and mushrooms to the pan. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the celery is limp.
4. Stir in flour and cook until it is dissolved.
5. Mix water, dry milk, salt, and pepper with a fork until blended.
6. Add the mixture from step 5 to the vegetables in the saucepan. Stir over moderate heat until smooth and thickened.
7. Add tuna to the mixture. Mix lightly.
8. Serve hot using 3/4 cup per serving. This yields 4 cups, which makes 6 servings.
9. Nutritive values per serving: 179 calories; 6 grams carbohydrates; 20 grams protein; 8 grams fat; 381 milligrams sodium.
10. Food Exchanges per serving: 1/2 milk, 2 lean meat.
11. For low-sodium diets, omit salt and use salt-free margarine.
